items.docs: The index endpoint, some common metadata

info.name: A list of all resources that exist

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh the policy is part of

params.name: resourceType
params.description: The type of resource (only some resources support rules api)

info.name: Returns resources matched by this policy

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh the policy is part of

params.name: size
params.description: The max number of items to return

params.name: name
params.description: A sub string to filter resources by name

items.docs: Returns resources matched by this policy. In the case of `targetRef` policies we'll match using the top level `targetRef`

info.name: Returns dataplanes matched by a MeshService

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh the service is part of

params.name: size
params.description: The max number of items to return

params.name: name
params.description: A sub string to filter resources by name

items.docs: Returns dataplanes matched by a MeshService

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh the service is part of

info.name: Get a proxy XDS config on a CP, this endpoint is only available on zone CPs.

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh of the DPP to get the diff for.

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the DPP within the mesh to get the diff for.

params.name: shadow
params.description: When computing XDS config the CP take into account policies with 'kuma.io/effect: shadow' label

params.name: include
params.description:
An array of extra fields to include in the response. When `include=diff` the server computes a diff in JSONPatch format
between the current proxy XDS config and the config returned in the 'xds' field.

items.docs: Returns the [xds](https://www.envoyproxy.io/docs/envoy/latest/api-docs/xds_protocol) configuration of the proxy.

info.name: Get networking layout for this dataplane

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh of the DPP to get the layout for.

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the DPP within the mesh to get the layout for.

items.docs: Returns detailed dataplane networking layout with most important information on dataplane and list of its inbounds and outbounds

info.name: Get proxy policies for this dataplane

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh of the DPP to get the diff for.

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the DPP within the mesh to get the diff for.

items.docs: Returns proxy level policy configuration derived from combining all proxy policies selecting this dataplane

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh of the DPP to get the policies for.

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the DPP within the mesh to get the policies for.

params.name: inbound-kri
params.description: The name of the Inbound from DPP to get the policies for.

items.docs: Returns inbound policy configuration derived from combining all policies selecting this dataplane

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh of the DPP to get the policies for.

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the DPP within the mesh to get the policies for.

params.name: kri
params.description: The KRI of the Outbound to get the policies for.

items.docs: Returns outbound policy configuration derived from combining all policies selecting this dataplane

info.name: Get routes configuration for this outbound

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh of the DPP to get the policies for.

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the DPP within the mesh to get the policies for.

params.name: kri
params.description: The KRI of the Outbound to get the routes for.

items.docs: Returns routes configuration derived from combining all routes on this outbound

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh of the DPP to get the policies for.

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the DPP within the mesh to get the policies for.

params.name: outbound-kri
params.description: The KRI of the Outbound to get the routes for.

params.name: route-kri
params.description: The KRI of the Route to get the configuration for.

items.docs: Returns route policy configuration derived from combining all policies selecting this dataplane

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh of the DPP to get the diff for.

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the DPP within the mesh to get the diff for.

params.name: mesh
params.description: The mesh of the DPP to get the diff for.
